task: Ask Copilot to refactor SentinelOps incident filtering and deduplication safely.
quality_check: The response must preserve auth checks, keep severity filtering compatible, and avoid changing the incident fingerprint format used for deduplication.
technique: Prompt compression: remove polite filler and encode API details as terse, structured input.
expected: Optimized uses fewer input (↑) tokens while preserving the same task and acceptance criteria.
